quests.name: The Wild Court
quests.description: Mystra's satyrs answer to older, wilder gods. Break their rites.
dialogueStart: The spirit spoke of Mystra — a wild court that feeds the temple its strength.
Cut down the satyrs and shatter the totem that channels their rites.
dialogueCompletion: The totem is dust. Their frenzy will fade without it.
But their champion, the Cyclops, still stomps the grove. It carries an eye the temple covets.

quests.name: The Cyclops' Eye
quests.description: Slay the Drunken Cyclopes and claim their eyes.
dialogueStart: Two eyes will do. They see through the temple's wards, or so the spirit claimed.
The Cyclopes hit like falling walls. Watch their ground — that's where they're deadliest.
dialogueCompletion: The eyes still weep. Unsettling... but they'll open the way south.
Hold the sacred grove one last time. The wild court will not forgive what you've done.

quests.name: The Sacred Grove
quests.description: Hold the grove against the fury of the wild court.

objectives.description: Repel 4 waves at the Sacred Grove

dialogueStart: This grove is the last knot binding Mystra to the temple. Sever it.
Everything they have left will come at you here. Four waves. Then it ends.
dialogueCompletion: The wild court is broken. Mystra falls silent behind you.
The road to the Temple Sector lies open now. Whatever waits there... it has been waiting a long time.
